VISIONRESTRICTOR.settings.defaultMaxRang: Maximum hard vision range in scene distance units, such as feet or meters depending on the scene. Use 0 to disable globally. A scene can override this value.
VISIONRESTRICTOR.sceneConfig.fieldHint: Hard-caps token vision on this scene using the scene distance units, such as feet or meters. Leave blank to use the world default. Use 0 to disable on this scene. The hard blackout radius uses this configured range even for special senses such as blindsight.
VISIONRESTRICTOR.notifications.sceneSet: Vision Restrictor: scene maximum vision set to {range}.
VISIONRESTRICTOR.notifications.sceneClea: Vision Restrictor: scene override cleared; using world default.
VISIONRESTRICTOR.notifications.worldOnly: Vision Restrictor settings can only be changed by a GM.
Opacity of the hard blackout beyond the maximum vision range. Use 1 for fully black blocked vision, or a lower value for testing.
